description: Comprehensive AI Design System Knowledge Graph modeling all entities and relationships in the ERP Design System

primary.name: Primary Filled Background
primary.description: Primary filled background color for active states and high-emphasis elements

surface-default.name: Surface Default
surface-default.description: Default surface background color for neutral containers

focus-ring.name: Focus Ring
focus-ring.description: Visible focus indicator for keyboard navigation

components.name: Button
components.description: Interactive element that triggers actions with multiple emphasis levels and color roles
variants: color (primary, danger, warning, success, neutral, ai)
state (default, hover, focus, pressed, disabled, loading)

components.name: Icon Button
components.description: Square interactive element with icon only, no label text
variants: color (primary, danger, warning, success, neutral, ai)

components.name: Badge
components.description: Small status indicator overlaid on other elements
variants: color (primary, danger, warning, success, neutral, ai)

components.name: Chip
components.description: Compact element for filters, tags, or selections
variants: color (primary, danger, warning, success, neutral, ai)

components.name: Toggle
components.description: Binary switch element for boolean settings

components.name: Avatar
components.description: Visual representation of a user or entity with initials, image, or icon

components.name: Divider
components.description: Visual separator between sections or list items

components.name: Card
components.description: Container for grouped content with multiple slot types and surface variants
variants: content type (text, media, metric, profile, list-item, action)

components.name: Panel
components.description: Persistent content region that adapts from side panel on desktop to bottom sheet on mobile

components.name: Dialog
components.description: Modal overlay requiring user action before continuing with backdrop

components.name: Alert
components.description: Non-modal notification for important messages and status information

components.name: Snackbar
components.description: Brief notification that appears at bottom of screen with optional action

components.name: Toast
components.description: Short-lived notification that auto-dismisses with minimal footprint

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: Brief helper text that appears on hover for additional context

components.name: Popover
components.description: Anchored content region that contains complex information or controls

components.name: Menu
components.description: Anchored dropdown list of actions or selections with keyboard navigation
variants: type (simple, with icons, with shortcuts, with selection)

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Single-line or multi-line text input with support for validation and helper text
variants: state (empty, filled, focused, error, disabled, readonly)
with/without (label, helper, error message, leading icon, trailing icon, counter, prefix, suffix)

components.name: Selection Controls
components.description: Checkbox, Radio, and Switch for boolean and choice selections

components.name: Slider
components.description: Range input for numeric values with optional dual handles

components.name: Date Picker
components.description: Calendar-based date selection with range support and preset options

components.name: Tag Input
components.description: Multi-value input for entering and managing tags or keywords

components.name: File Upload
components.description: File selection with drag-and-drop, preview, and progress indication
variants: with/without (preview, progress bar, file size limit)

components.name: Tabs
components.description: Horizontal navigation between content sections with active indicator

components.name: Breadcrumb
components.description: Hierarchical path navigation showing location in site structure

components.name: Nav Rail
components.description: Vertical navigation sidebar with icon-only or icon+label modes

components.name: Bottom Nav
components.description: Mobile-first bottom navigation bar with 3-5 action items

components.name: Pagination
components.description: Controls for navigating through paginated content

components.name: Stepper
components.description: Visual progress indicator for multi-step processes

components.name: List
components.description: Structured vertical collection of related items with optional selection and actions

components.name: Accordion
components.description: Collapsible sections for organizing content with expand/collapse toggle
variants: exclusive (single open section, multiple open sections)

components.name: Data Grid
components.description: Enterprise data table with sorting, filtering, pagination, and row actions

components.name: Tree View
components.description: Hierarchical data display with expandable nodes and lazy loading

components.name: Timeline
components.description: Chronological display of events or activities with visual markers

components.name: Loading
components.description: Progress and skeleton loaders for content placeholders and activity indicators

components.name: AI Chat
components.description: Conversational AI interface with message history, streaming responses, and rich content
variants: message type (text, code, image, file, action, system)

components.name: Command Palette
components.description: Keyboard-driven command search and execution interface

components.name: Notification Center
components.description: Centralized display and management of all notifications and alerts

components.name: Search
components.description: Contextual search with filters, suggestions, and results display

components.name: Empty States
components.description: Placeholder displays for views with no data or content
variants: type (no data, no results, error, permission)

patterns.name: Kanban Board
patterns.description: Drag-and-drop column-based task/item management with WIP limits
patterns.interaction: Drag card between columns, reorder within column, open detail dialog, manage column via menu

patterns.name: Flow Canvas
patterns.description: Node-based visual workflow/logic builder with pan, zoom, and connections
patterns.interaction: Drag node from palette, connect ports, select/configure nodes, pan/zoom canvas

patterns.name: Form Builder
patterns.description: Drag-and-drop form creation and configuration interface with validation and conditional logic
patterns.interaction: Drag field from palette, configure properties, reorder fields, preview form, publish schema

patterns.name: Web Chat Widget
patterns.description: Embeddable customer-facing chat interface with launcher button and iframe isolation
patterns.interaction: Click launcher to expand, fill pre-chat form, send messages, minimize/close

patterns.name: Dashboard
patterns.description: Analytics and metrics overview with configurable widget grid and KPI cards
patterns.interaction: View metrics, select date range, refresh data, drag-to-reorder widgets, configure widgets

patterns.name: Inbox
patterns.description: Conversation list + detail split-view for messaging/support with real-time updates
patterns.interaction: Search/filter conversations, click to load detail, respond in chat, assign/star, bulk select

templates.name: Dashboard Template
templates.description: Analytics and KPI overview page with metric cards and data visualizations

templates.name: Conversation Inbox Template
templates.description: Conversation list and messaging interface for customer support

templates.name: Analytics Workspace Template
templates.description: Advanced analytics page with data grid, charts, and filtering controls

templates.name: Admin Console Template
templates.description: Administrative configuration interface with navigation and content panels

templates.name: Approval Workflow Page
templates.description: Multi-step approval process with status indicators and action buttons

features.name: AI Conversation Management
features.description: Enable conversational interactions with AI-powered responses and message history

features.name: Analytics Visualization
features.description: Display metrics and data insights with configurable charts and KPI cards

features.name: Conversation Management
features.description: Organize, filter, and track customer conversations with real-time updates

features.name: Real-time Messaging
features.description: Support live message delivery with presence indicators and typing notifications

features.name: Data Analysis and Insights
features.description: Enable filtering, sorting, and exporting of large datasets with drill-down capabilities

features.name: Advanced Filtering
features.description: Complex search and filter controls with saved filter presets

features.name: Custom Reporting
features.description: Generate and export custom reports with selected metrics and date ranges

features.name: System Configuration
features.description: Administrative settings for system behavior and integration parameters

features.name: User Management
features.description: Create, modify, and deactivate user accounts with role assignment

features.name: Workflow Management
features.description: Define and execute multi-step business processes with conditional logic

features.name: Approval Tracking
features.description: Monitor approval requests and execution status across workflows

features.name: Status Notification
features.description: Proactive alerts for workflow status changes and approval decisions

features.name: Metric Tracking
features.description: Real-time KPI monitoring with historical trends and comparisons

features.name: Data Export
features.description: Export analytics data in multiple formats (CSV, PDF, Excel)

accessibilityRules.name: Color Contrast AAA
accessibilityRules.description: Text must have minimum 7:1 contrast ratio with background

accessibilityRules.name: Color Contrast AA
accessibilityRules.description: Text must have minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio with background

accessibilityRules.name: Keyboard Navigation
accessibilityRules.description: All functionality must be accessible via keyboard without mouse

accessibilityRules.name: Focus Visible
accessibilityRules.description: Keyboard focus indicator must be visible and persistent

accessibilityRules.name: Screen Reader Support
accessibilityRules.description: All content must be announced correctly by screen readers with proper ARIA labels

accessibilityRules.name: Form Labels
accessibilityRules.description: All form inputs must have explicit labels with proper association

accessibilityRules.name: Table Structure
accessibilityRules.description: Data tables must use proper semantic HTML with headers and captions

accessibilityRules.name: Semantic HTML
accessibilityRules.description: Use semantic HTML elements to convey meaning and structure

accessibilityRules.name: Error Identification and Suggestion
accessibilityRules.description: Errors must be identified and suggestions provided to correct them

complianceRules.name: Data Privacy
complianceRules.description: Personal data must be collected and processed with explicit consent

complianceRules.name: GDPR Compliance
complianceRules.description: Comply with EU General Data Protection Regulation

complianceRules.name: Data Retention Policy
complianceRules.description: Implement data retention schedule with automatic deletion after retention period

complianceRules.name: Content Moderation
complianceRules.description: Monitor and filter inappropriate or harmful user-generated content

complianceRules.name: Audit Logging
complianceRules.description: Maintain audit trail of all user actions and system changes for compliance verification

complianceRules.name: Message Encryption
complianceRules.description: Encrypt messages in transit (TLS) and at rest for sensitive communications

complianceRules.name: Data Security
complianceRules.description: Protect sensitive data with encryption and access controls

complianceRules.name: Data Export Security
complianceRules.description: Control and audit all data exports with watermarking and access logs

complianceRules.name: Access Control
complianceRules.description: Implement role-based access control (RBAC) with least privilege principle

motionRules.name: Hover Feedback
motionRules.description: Interactive elements provide immediate visual feedback on hover
motionRules.implementation: state layer overlay with opacity transition

motionRules.name: Focus Indicator
motionRules.description: Keyboard focus is indicated with a visible ring or border

motionRules.name: Modal Enter Animation
motionRules.description: Dialogs and modals fade in with scale from center

motionRules.name: Modal Exit Animation
motionRules.description: Dialogs and modals scale down with fade out on close

motionRules.name: Panel Slide Animation
motionRules.description: Side panels slide in from edge on open

motionRules.name: Message Appear Animation
motionRules.description: Chat messages fade up when they appear in the list

motionRules.name: Skeleton Loading Animation
motionRules.description: Placeholder skeletons shimmer to indicate loading

motionRules.name: Badge Pulse Animation
motionRules.description: Notification badges pulse subtly to draw attention

motionRules.name: List Item Stagger
motionRules.description: List items appear sequentially with staggered animations

motionRules.name: Drag Feedback
motionRules.description: Dragged elements scale up and show shadow during drag

motionRules.name: Success Checkmark Animation
motionRules.description: Checkmark appears with draw animation on success
motionRules.implementation: SVG stroke dasharray animation with bounce easing

motionRules.name: Error Shake Animation
motionRules.description: Form fields shake on validation error

background color for user message bubble

Contact avatars in list and header

Menu items navigable via arrow keys

Chat input and controls keyboard accessible

Dialog fades in with scale animation
Dialog scales down and fades out on close
